text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their argument has a lasting effect on Daiwa
Scarlet, whose performance on the track begins
to slump.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her running reflects the anxiety in her heart.
Seeing her condition, I decide to...
choice_data_list: Enter her in the Japanese Oaks.
Enter her in the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to stick to the path Daiwa Scarlet has
chosen and prepare for the Japanese Oaks,
aiming for a conquest of the Tiara tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I prepare to enter her in the Japanese Derby,
where she will face off against Vodka.
